title: carex rugulosa var. graciliculmis
intro: Carex rugulosa var. graciliculmis, commonly known as a type of sedge, is a plant species that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Carex rugulosa var. graciliculmis can be prepared as an infusion or decoction for its herbal benefits, although the exact preparation methods may vary depending on the traditional practices.
